glosses.vi: mặt trăng; vệ tinh tự nhiên

sentences.target: Heute scheint der Mond sehr hell.

translations.de: Heute scheint der Mond sehr hell.
translations.en: Today the moon is shining very brightly.
translations.es: Esta noche la luna está muy brillante.
translations.fr: La lune est très brillante ce soir.
translations.it: Stasera la luna è molto luminosa.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite a lua está muito brilhante.
translations.nl: Vanavond is de maan heel helder.
translations.hu: Ma éjjel nagyon fényes a hold.
translations.hi: आज रात चाँद बहुत चमक रहा है।
translations.pl: Dziś w nocy księżyc jest bardzo jasny.
translations.el: Απόψε το φεγγάρι είναι πολύ φωτεινό.
translations.nb: I kveld er månen veldig lys.
translations.ro: În seara asta luna e foarte luminoasă.
translations.cs: Dnes v noci je měsíc velmi jasný.
translations.da: I aften er månen meget lys.
translations.fi: Tänä yönä kuu on tosi kirkas.
translations.ja: 今夜は月がとても明るいです。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb specifying when the event happens; modifies the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); intransitive; predicates the subject.
Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner for the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine; syntactic subject of the clause.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective that follows.
Predicative adjective complement describing the subject's property via the verb.

sentences.target: Ich sehe den Mond über den Bäumen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzeːə deːn moːnt ˈyːbɐ deːn ˈbɔʏ̯mən/

translations.de: Ich sehe den Mond über den Bäumen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzeːə deːn moːnt ˈyːbɐ deːn ˈbɔʏ̯mən/
translations.en: I see the moon above the trees.
translations.es: Veo la luna sobre los árboles.
translations.fr: Je vois la lune au-dessus des arbres.
translations.it: Vedo la luna sopra gli alberi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我看到树梢上方的月亮。
translations.yue: 我見到樹頂上面嘅月亮。
translations.pt: Vejo a lua por cima das árvores.
translations.he: אני רואה את הירח מעל העצים.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy mặt trăng trên các tán cây.
translations.nl: Ik zie de maan boven de bomen.
translations.hu: Látom a holdat a fák fölött.
translations.hi: मैं पेड़ों के ऊपर चाँद देख रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Βλέπω το φεγγάρι πάνω από τα δέντρα.
translations.id: Aku melihat bulan di atas pepohonan.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present); transitive; takes a direct object.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb.
Preposition indicating spatial relation; in static contexts governs the dative; heads the PP 'über den Bäumen'.
Definite article, dative plural; determiner for 'Bäumen' in the prepositional phrase.
Common noun, plural dative; object of the preposition 'über'; -n ending marks dative plural.

sentences.target: Der Mond steht genau über dem Haus.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ moːnt ʃteːt ɡəˈnaʊ̯ ˈyːbɐ deːm haʊ̯s/

translations.de: Der Mond steht genau über dem Haus.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ moːnt ʃteːt ɡəˈnaʊ̯ ˈyːbɐ deːm haʊ̯s/
translations.en: The moon is right above the house.
translations.es: La luna está justo encima de la casa.
translations.fr: La lune est juste au-dessus de la maison.
translations.it: La luna è proprio sopra la casa.
translations.pt: A lua está bem em cima da casa.
translations.vi: Mặt trăng ở ngay trên ngôi nhà.
translations.nl: De maan staat precies boven het huis.
translations.hu: A hold pont a ház fölött van.
translations.hi: चाँद ठीक घर के ऊपर है।
translations.el: Το φεγγάρι είναι ακριβώς πάνω από το σπίτι.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner for the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine; syntactic subject.
Finite intransitive verb (3rd person singular, present); denotes static position.
Adverb modifying the predicate to indicate precision of location.
Preposition indicating spatial relation; with static location, governs the dative.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner for 'Haus' in the PP.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'über'.

sentences.target: Sie fotografiert den Mond mit ihrem Handy.
sentences.reading: /ziː foːtoɡʁaˈfiːɐ̯t deːn moːnt mɪt ˈiːʁəm ˈhɛndi/

translations.de: Sie fotografiert den Mond mit ihrem Handy.
translations.ipa: /ziː foːtoɡʁaˈfiːɐ̯t deːn moːnt mɪt ˈiːʁəm ˈhɛndi/
translations.en: She’s photographing the moon with her phone.
translations.es: Está fotografiando la luna con su móvil.
translations.fr: Elle prend en photo la lune avec son téléphone.
translations.it: Sta fotografando la luna con il suo telefono.
translations.pt: Ela está fotografando a lua com o celular.
translations.he: היא מצלמת את הירח בטלפון שלה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang chụp ảnh mặt trăng bằng điện thoại.
translations.nl: Ze fotografeert de maan met haar telefoon.
translations.uk: Вона фотографує місяць на свій телефон.
translations.hi: वह अपने फोन से चाँद की फोटो खींच रही है।
translations.el: Φωτογραφίζει το φεγγάρι με το κινητό της.
translations.nb: Hun tar bilde av månen med mobilen sin.
translations.ro: Ea fotografiază luna cu telefonul ei.
translations.da: Hun fotograferer månen med sin telefon.
translations.ja: 彼女はスマホで月を撮っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite transitive verb (3rd person singular, present); selects a direct object.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'fotografiert'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces the instrument phrase.
Possessive determiner, dative neuter singular; agrees with 'Handy' and marks possession.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'mit'; denotes the instrument.
